title: AP Capital City Works — Time and Progress Chart per Milestone
text_english: The Contractor SHALL SUBMIT a TIME AND PROGRESS CHART for EACH MILESTONE of this Work. The Engineer-in-Charge MAY, within {{program_review_days}} (default 15) days thereafter, MODIFY and COMMUNICATE the program approved to the Contractor; failing such communication, the program submitted by the Contractor SHALL be DEEMED to be APPROVED by the Engineer-in-Charge. The work programme SHALL include all DETAILS OF BALANCE DRAWINGS and DECISIONS REQUIRED to complete the contract — with SPECIFIC DATES by which these details are required by the Contractor. Progress reports SHALL include: a construction schedule for the next {{forward_window_months}} (default 3) months showing micro-milestones and targeted tasks; AT LEAST {{photo_min_count}} (default 10) digital photographs of all parts of the construction site; AND AT LEAST {{video_min_minutes}} (default 5) MINUTES of video showing execution of different items in soft copy.
